title: Nephrodium punctulatum
taxonomy: Nephrodium punctulatum is a species of fern, and its classification falls under the following categories: Kingdom - Plantae, Division - Pteridophyta, Class - Polypodiopsida, Order - Polypodiales, and Family - Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Nephrodium, which is now often included in the genus Dryopteris. The classification of Nephrodium punctulatum is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its frond structure and spore production. This fern species is native to certain regions, but specific information about its native habitats is limited. Further research is needed to understand the complete taxonomy and distribution of Nephrodium punctulatum.
